description: Twenty differentiating USP capabilities for the Power BI Expert-Replacement Factory.

capabilities.name: One-Click Process-to-PBIP
capabilities.summary: Turn a selected process pack into a PBIP/TMDL/PBIR generation target.
evidence: model spec declares tables and relationships

capabilities.name: Connector-Aware Source Interview
capabilities.summary: Ask source-specific questions and route to native Power BI connectors and modes.

capabilities.name: KPI Contract Negotiator
capabilities.summary: Force KPI grain, date basis, numerator, denominator, exclusions, owner, and tolerance decisions before DAX.

capabilities.name: Ambiguous-Path Prevention Engine
capabilities.summary: Check model relationships for ambiguity before Power BI Desktop load.

capabilities.name: Frown-to-Fix Knowledge Loop
capabilities.summary: Classify Power BI Desktop errors and map them to repair and validation steps.

capabilities.name: Visual Binding Compiler
capabilities.summary: Verify report-page specs bind only to generated fields and measures.

capabilities.name: Measure Test Harness
capabilities.summary: Attach test/reconciliation strategy to every generated KPI measure.

capabilities.name: Process Digital Twin Layer
capabilities.summary: Use case/event/KPI structures to simulate and compare process-flow scenarios.

capabilities.name: Action Cockpit Generator
capabilities.summary: Generate owner/action cockpit specs from exceptions, root causes, risk, and value.

capabilities.name: RLS/OLS Policy Generator
capabilities.summary: Generate process-owner role policy and note required enterprise identity mapping.

capabilities.name: Source-to-KPI Lineage
capabilities.summary: Connect source systems, model tables, measures, and visuals for governance.

capabilities.name: Process Pack Marketplace
capabilities.summary: Expose each process as a cataloged reusable Power BI data product.

capabilities.name: Industry Variant Packs
capabilities.summary: Support industry-specific process variants through domain, plant, source, and KPI metadata.

capabilities.name: Power BI CoE Certification Bot
capabilities.summary: Evaluate process packs against certification gates and evidence requirements.

capabilities.name: Report Consolidation AI
capabilities.summary: Detect duplicate KPI/report intents and route them to the reusable process pack.

capabilities.name: Semantic Model Refactoring
capabilities.summary: Refactor poor models into declared facts, dimensions, and many-to-one relationships.

capabilities.name: Query Folding Verifier
capabilities.summary: Record folding expectations for native production connectors and route risky sources.

capabilities.name: Refresh Failure Triage
capabilities.summary: Map gateway, auth, schema, privacy, folding, timeout, and source errors to repair decisions.

capabilities.name: Business Value Realization Tracker
capabilities.summary: Track insight-to-action-to-value using action count, risk, and value fields.

capabilities.name: Boardroom Narrative Generator
capabilities.summary: Generate executive storyline from KPI status, root causes, financial impact, and decisions needed.
